name: splitwise
title: Splitwise
description: Track shared expenses — add friends, log who paid for what, see per-person totals.

tables.friends: People who can pay for expenses
tables.expenses: Individual paid expenses, referencing a payer
tables.expense_participants: M:N — which friends share each expense
tables.settlements: Payments from one friend to another that reduce outstanding debt

capabilities: net debts between pairs (who owes whom)
settle up between friends (record a payment that reduces debt)
